bta_example_pkg
package bta_example_pkg
View source

Example package demonstrating correct NaturalDocs documentation.  This package contains properly documented classes, functions, tasks, and constraints that comply with BTA coding standards.

Type Definitions
state_e
typedef enum {
IDLE_t,
ACTIVE_t,
WAIT_t,
DONE_t
} state_e
View source

State machine enumeration type for agent states

addr_t
typedef logic [31:0] addr_t
View source

Address type for memory operations

data_t
typedef logic [63:0] data_t
View source

Data type for transactions
